overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk urban plaza, transitioning through a covered outdoor dining patio with neon lighting, then into a narrow vendor street with food carts. High-quality game engine footage featuring industrial architecture, digital billboards, and scattered pedestrians.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza with industrial architecture under a partly cloudy sky. The camera moves forward toward a covered dining structure in the distance, passing scattered pedestrians. Large digital billboards and metal walkways dominate the skyline.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a semi-covered dining patio with a glass roof structure overhead. Red plastic chairs fill the space while neon pink lighting illuminates the left wall. The camera pauses to view a large digital menu screen before continuing through the patio toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with food vendors and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered patio, the scene opens into a narrower commercial street lined with food vendor carts. A prominent red neon sign for THE SHACK hangs overhead while pedestrians browse the stalls. The camera moves past a green dumpster and graffiti-covered walls, navigating through the moderate crowd.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, industrial urban plaza into the intimate, neon-lit corridors of a commercial vendor street. It begins by gliding across an open plaza under a partly cloudy sky, passing scattered pedestrians and towering digital billboards toward a distant covered structure. As the camera enters the dining patio, the open skyline is replaced by a glass roof and a glow of neon pink lighting reflecting off rows of red plastic chairs. The scene then shifts from the sheltered patio into a narrower street, where the space tightens around food vendor carts and a prominent red neon sign for THE SHACK. Finally, the camera navigates through a moderate crowd, moving past graffiti-covered walls and a green dumpster as it pushes deeper into the commercial district.
